app.title: TraceMux
app.subtitle: unified terminal for local & networked logs
status.closed_detail: Disconnected from the TraceMux server. Commands will not be sent until the connection reopens.
status.error_detail: The TraceMux server connection has an error.
notifications.title: System messages
terminal.send_error: Failed to send. Check that the server connection is open.
settings.display.title: Display
settings.metadata.title: Terminal metadata
settings.tiles.title: Tiles
settings.timezone.help: Use local, UTC, IANA names such as Asia/Tokyo, or fixed offsets like GMT+9.
settings.timezone.invalid: Invalid time zone; timestamps fall back to local time.
settings.display.reset_confirm: Reset browser-local display settings to defaults?
settings.log_type_notes.title: Log type notes
settings.log_type_notes.placeholder: Free-form memo for this log type/tag...
settings.log_type_notes.help: Synced to the server when available, with browser storage as a fallback; raw log data remains server-owned.
settings.log_type_notes.sync_failed: Log type note sync failed; saved locally only and not on the server yet.
settings.source_start.title: Source start defaults
settings.source_start.send_rules: Send classification rules when starting sources
settings.source_start.help: These options are sent with new source starts. Existing source display decoding can still be changed per source.
settings.classification.title: Classification rules
settings.classification.help: Rules tag decoded live display locally and can be sent to the server for persisted logs on source start.
sources.empty: No live sources yet. Add one with a source spec above.
sources.spec.label: Source spec
sources.spec.help: URI style: file, tcp, udp, serial, pcap, process, pipe, mock.
sources.preset.label: Source preset
sources.preset.name_help: Use letters, numbers, dot, dash, or underscore.
sources.preset.name_invalid: Preset names can use only letters, numbers, dot, dash, or underscore.
sources.preset.help: Saves only the source spec locally in this browser, never log data.
sources.serial.select_required: Select at least one COM port
sources.serial.help: Candidates are only opened after you confirm the checked ports.
sources.pcap.help: Metrics appear in the Metrics panel; raw packet UI publish stays bounded by the selected mode.
sources.start.options_help: Encoding/rules/session pattern are optional start-time settings; no log bytes are stored in the browser.
sources.pending.title: Waiting for server acknowledgement:
sources.column.name: Name
sources.action.open_terminal_first_chann: Open the first channel in the existing Terminal panel:
sources.action.open_new_terminal_first_c: Open the first channel in a new Terminal panel:
sources.action.remove_confirm: Remove this source from the server registry? Persisted logs on the server are not deleted.
sources.action.send_failed: Request was not sent; server connection is not open.
sources.detail.title: Source details
sources.detail.name: Name
sources.detail.alias_help: Used in Terminal/Tile labels instead of the short session id.
sources.detail.encoding_help: Used by this browser when decoding live raw bytes for this source.
sources.detail.server_encoding_help: Restart applies this source encoding to server-side decoded/persisted logs from this point onward.
sources.detail.server_encoding_requested: Source restart requested with selected encoding
sources.detail.detected_encoding_request: Source restart requested with detected encoding
sources.detail.channel_encoding_help: Optional per-channel overrides. Empty/inherited channels use the source display encoding.
sources.detail.session_dir_help: Server-side path where raw/index/decoded logs are written for this source.
sources.export.title: Export
sources.export.help: Downloads the server-side session-dir via the authenticated export API.
sources.export.unavailable: Export is available after this source is persisted by the server.
sources.export_all.title: Export all sources
sources.export_all.help: Builds one ZIP on the server and downloads it through the browser. Sources
sources.export_all.unavailable: No persisted sources are available yet.
sources.export_all.pcapng_unavailable: No persisted pcap sources are available yet.
sources.detail.notes_help: Synced to the server when available, with browser storage as a fallback; log bytes remain server-owned.
sources.detail.notes_sync_failed: Source note sync failed; saved locally only and not on the server yet.
packetCapture.no_source: No pcap source is available yet. Start a pcap source with publish=sampled or full to inspect packets.
packetCapture.empty: No packets captured in this panel yet.
packetCapture.dropped_title: The UI packet buffer is bounded; oldest packets are dropped first.
packetCapture.detail.empty: Select a packet to inspect details.
